text_excerpt: News | Mark Pritchard Skip to main content Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin Main navigation Home About Mark News About The Wrekin Campaigns In Parliament Contact Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin News Mark Pritchard MP Visits Hodnet Village Store and Post Office. Sunday, 28 September, 2025 It was great to see Kiran again, who continues to support the local community by expanding Hodnet Village Store & Post Office's retail offer and food range! Articles Mark Meets with Stoke Heath-based Revolution Brewery 28th September 2025 I met with Master Brewer Tom who, along with Will and Mark Charman, runs the impressive Revolution Brewery at Stoke Heath. I hope the Chancellor will recognise...
